ai_diagnosis.summary: Your product shows strong early conversion at 15.25%, but traffic is extremely low with only 59 sessions and no ad spend, so growth is currently visibility-limited. Competitors rely heavily on broad organic keyword coverage, while several are using aggressive Sponsored Products, video, and brand ads to capture hair/scalp itch-related demand.
keyword_opportunities: itchy scalp relief / scalp itch relief
tea tree scalp treatment / dandruff scalp oil
anti itch ointment / anti itch balm
dry scalp relief / flaky scalp treatment
ad_strategy: Launch Sponsored Products auto campaign to mine converting search terms, then move winners into exact and phrase campaigns.
Build manual campaigns around high-intent itch-relief and scalp-relief terms instead of competing broadly on expensive hair growth terms first.
Test product targeting against competitors with high ad exposure, especially B0DCX7628T, B0DBLCYTZ6, and B0CMXF1NK3.
If Brand Registry is available, add Sponsored Brands Video for scalp itch/dandruff relief angles because competitor B0DCX7628T is already using video heavily.
organic_growth: Rewrite title, bullets, and backend search terms around itch relief, scalp relief, dry scalp, dandruff, tea tree, and natural soothing-care angles.
Improve main image and secondary images to clearly show use case, size, texture, application area, and before/after-style benefit framing without unsupported medical claims.
Drive initial review volume and maintain conversion above 12% to help organic ranking once traffic scales.
Create coupon or limited-time deal to increase click-through rate and support ranking gains during the first ad push.
alerts: B0DCX7628T is the most aggressive advertiser with 811 ad keywords and 464 video ad keywords, likely pushing up CPCs in the category.
B0CMXF1NK3 and B0DBLCYTZ6 combine strong organic coverage with heavy brand ad presence, making head terms difficult to win quickly.
B0DW3YH4WH has high recommendation share at 21.5% with low ad dependence, indicating strong algorithmic placement risk.
Your current no-ad strategy limits keyword discovery and ranking momentum despite good conversion.
